task:
In galculator, switch to Paper mode and set the number base to HEX, then compute `FF + 1` in hexadecimal (result is `100` hex, equivalent to 256 decimal).

Galculator must remain in HEX mode so the hexadecimal representation is what is shown. The final display must show exactly the string `100`. Leave galculator open.

verification.description: Display shows 100 (which is FF + 1 in hexadecimal)
